name: Lightning Rod
appearances: Lightning Rod Faces the Cyclops Queen
Trigger Happy Targets the Evil Kaos
cameos: Stump Smash Crosses the Bone Dragon
description: Lightning Rod is an Air storm giant Skylander from Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure.
biography: Lightning Rod once lived in the majestic Cloud Kingdom, where his countless acts of heroism along with his winning smile and electric physique made him the most famous storm giant in the realm. He was a true celebrity, and the palace halls were littered with statues of the chiseled hero. But all the praise and admiration could never quite satisfy Rod, who yearned for something more. As luck would have it, he met an adventurous young dragon named Spyro, who told him fantastic stories of faraway places and dangerous adventures. Rod was spellbound, and he set off with Spyro to seek an audience with Eon to join the Skylanders.
personality: Lightning Rod prides himself on being the most macho of all the other storm giants in Skylands, though he isn't used to sharing the spotlight. He is brave, but can also be charming and charismatic. Lightning Rod even considers everyone else in Skylands to be 'girlie', especially girls, and few are brave enough to argue with him! He is fully aware of his own monumental talents and is happy to blow his own trumpet, but happier to blast evildoers with thunder and lightning.

story.story_name: Lightning Rod Faces the Cyclops Queen
story.content: At the start of the Annual Storm Titan Games, Lightning Rod accidentally hurled a large hammer in the path of Flynn's balloon, causing it to spiral out of the control. The Skylanders quickly sprang into action, saving Flynn, Double Trouble, Hugo and Squirmgrub. Within the stadium, they discovered the Air segment of the Mask of Power was located at Tempest Towers. After being tricked and thrown into a tank with a Land Whale, Lightning Rod and Drobot escaped. Lightning Rod eventually drank one of Pop Fizz's potions to grow to a humongous size to carry the City Tower (the true Air segment) back to the Eternal Archive.

story.story_name: Stump Smash Crosses the Bone Dragon
story.content: Lightning Rod and Zoo Lou were assigned by Spyro to search Fantasm Forest for Master Eon, who was kidnapped by Squirmgrub. Later, when Stump Smash, Wrecking Ball, Countdown, Flameslinger, Flynn and Glumshanks were stranded by the rampaging Bone Dragon, Lightning Rod saw their distress signal and whipped up a strong gale that blew the group all back to the Eternal Archives.

story.story_name: Trigger Happy Targets the Evil Kaos
story.content: Lightning Rod was among the Skylanders who assembled to stop Kaos from using the completed Mask of Power. At Kaos' Kastle, the storm giant provided the non-flying Skylanders floating clouds to help them get to the castle by air. When the Skylanders confronted Kaos, the evil Portal Master used the Mask to steal their powers. However, Trigger Happy and the other Skylanders eventually tricked Kaos into performing their powers all at once, restoring their abilities and allowing them to destroy the Mask.

content: This mustn't mess with my hair!
A crown fit for a king!
I am known by many names.
Behold! Christmas wishes from all the many great heroes of Skylands!
By my beard and biceps, I shall save them!
Lightning Rod. Champion of the Cloud Kingdom. Master of Lightning. Winner of the mightiest beard ten years running. You have heard of me, yes?

trivia: Lightning Rod seems to be based on Zeus from Greek Mythology.
Lightning Rod, the Leviathan and Persephone are the only three characters to be based on Greek Mythology.
Lightning Rod was the first Skylander whose toy stand is also part of his body. The second was Nightfall with her hair forming the base.
He is the only Air Skylander who doesn't fly, though he is considered already a flying Skylander, as he is levitating.

According to the Skylanders Sticker Book: Meet the Skylanders, Lightning Rod was invited by Master Eon to join after driving away Kaos with a lightning bolt, which differs from his official game biography.
Though Lightning Rod's species is Storm Giant, his Skylander class is not a Giant. In the book, his species is referred to as a storm titan.
His hair is purple in some of his upgrade pictures, though this is fixed in Skylanders: Giants.
Lightning Rod, Warnado, and Jet-Vac are the only Air Skylanders who don't need wings to fly.
His catchphrase is a pun on 'Three Strikes And You're Out!'
Lightning Rod is voiced by Alex Ness, who also voices Drobot, Double Trouble, Broccoli Guy and the Chompy Mage.
Whispering quietly is not Lightning Rod's strong point.
There is a glitch that removes Lightning Rod's cloud and makes him appear without any legs near the Mirror of Mystery.
He is similar to the Lightning Lord enemies from Mega Man 2 in name, appearance, and gameplay.
His series 1 figure has him holding one lightning bolt, and his series 2 has him holding two.
His Series 2's Wow Pow is a reference to the Kamehameha from Dragon Ball.

trailers.name: Skylanders Spyro's Adventure - Lightning Rod Trailer (One Strike and You're Out)
Skylanders Spyro's Adventure - Lightning Rod Preview Trailer (One Strike and You're Out)
Meet the Skylanders Series 2 Lightning Rod

gameplay: Lightning Rod can throw bolts of lightning at his enemies, he can also summon a powerful blast of lightning from above and control where it strikes. Lightning Rod can even produce an electrical field from his cloud torso. In the Mask of Power novels, it has been revealed that Lightning Rod has god-like strength, as he was able to lift a 400 ton hammer and hurl it far, as well as take a cannon ball blast to the chest without any damage or harm. He could also control the weather in different ways, whether it would be creating a thunder storm, or creating mighty winds. Being a storm giant, he can fly, and create clouds that allow others to fly as well.

basic.name: Lightning Bolt
basic.content: Throw a lightning bolt at enemies.

basic.name: Grand Lightning Summoning
basic.content: Bring lightning down from the sky and control where it moves.

basic_upgrades.name: Thunderation
basic_upgrades.content: Grand Lightning attack lasts longer and does increased damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Zapper Field
basic_upgrades.content: Create a electrical storm that damages enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Lightning Harpoon
basic_upgrades.content: Lighting Bolts stick into enemies and continue to damage them.

soulgems.name: Zapper Field Deluxe
soulgems.content: Zapper Field and clouds do extra damage.

wow_pows.name: Big Bolt
wow_pows.content: Hold Attack 1 to throw the biggest bolt of lightning known to man!

abilities.name: Faster Caster
abilities.content: Summon the Grand Lightning attack much faster.

abilities.name: Electricity City
abilities.content: Grand Lightning attack has even more power and does more damage.

abilities.name: Lightning Avatar
abilities.content: Summon the most powerful Grand Lightning attack ever!

abilities.name: Cloud Zapper Satellite
abilities.content: A protective cloud follows you and zaps any enemies that come near.

abilities.name: Zappier Sats
abilities.content: Protective zapper clouds do increased damage.

abilities.name: Zapper Satellite Defense
abilities.content: A third protective cloud joins you.
